calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status With A Petition Requesting Additional Time For Estate Administration Must Be Filed At Least Two Weeks Before That Status Date. Appearance Will Be Required On Jun-21-2027 If No Petition Has Been Filed.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Continued To Dec-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Mangini for petitioner John Narsavich (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court noted that examiner's notes remain outstanding. Mr. Mangini acknowledged the deficiencies and stated that an amended petition would be filed within two weeks to cure the defects.

The Court continued the matter to December 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
